title: dicliptera manilalii
intro: Dicliptera manilalii is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae, commonly known as a type of mint or a fragrant herb. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Dicliptera manilalii include relief from fever, headaches, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
